source_query: Build a Geant4 shielding study for 14 MeV neutrons through polyethylene, borated polyethylene, lead, and a downstream silicon detector. Score neutron leakage, secondary gamma production proxy, detector dose, material stack sensitivity, and produce a report with assumptions and limitations.

value: Dimensions (thickness, width, height) for polyethylene layer not specified
Dimensions for borated polyethylene layer not specified
Dimensions for lead layer not specified
Dimensions for silicon detector not specified

agent_context.codegen_instruction: Use these user-confirmed values as hard constraints. Edited constraints override the same field_path in g4_model_ir, defaults, examples, RAG, and model guesses. Do not replace geometry, placement, source, material, or scoring values with generic defaults.
